overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic western game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through a rainy, lantern-lit alleyway at night. The character navigates from an open courtyard through a narrow covered passage to a wooden door, with wet cobblestones reflecting the warm artificial lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rainy courtyard toward the building ahead, passing wooden barrels and vegetation

entered.detail: large wooden barrel with metal bands sitting near the building wall
weathered red plaster wall of a wooden building with small windows
dense green bushes and plants growing along the right side fence
tall wooden fence structure partially covered in vines
warm glowing lantern hanging above the courtyard entrance
wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the lantern light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a rainy courtyard at night, passing wooden barrels and dense vegetation. The wet cobblestones reflect the warm glow of a hanging lantern ahead, while red plaster walls line the left side of the path.

events.description: character turns left and enters the narrow covered alleyway from the open courtyard

agents.ego_description: turning left into the narrow alley and walking between the stone and plaster walls toward the distant light

entered.detail: rough stone wall with patches of moss and ivy on the left side of the alley
wooden beams and planks forming a partial roof over the alley
wall-mounted iron lantern casting warm light on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow covered alleyway, transitioning from the open courtyard to an enclosed passage. The alley features a stone wall on the left with a mounted lantern and the red plaster wall now on the right, with wooden beams overhead providing shelter from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: small brick courtyard with arched doorway

events.description: exiting the narrow alley into a small enclosed brick courtyard with an arched doorway ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the wooden door with an arched top, approaching the end of the passage

entered.detail: red brick wall with weathered mortar on the left side of the small courtyard
tall wooden door with an arched brick frame and a small window above
ornate wall-mounted lantern illuminating the brick wall near the door
large wooden cart wheel leaning against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley into a small brick courtyard featuring an arched wooden door ahead. A wall-mounted lantern illuminates the red brick wall on the left, while a wooden cart wheel rests against the right wall. The character approaches the door at the end of the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy night environment that transitions from an open courtyard into a narrow passage and finally toward a secluded doorway. It begins by following the character through a wet courtyard past wooden barrels and dense vegetation, where the cobblestones reflect the warm glow of a hanging lantern against red plaster walls. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a narrow covered alleyway, enclosing the view between a stone wall with a mounted lantern and overhead wooden beams that shield the path from the rain. The camera then emerges from the enclosure into a small brick courtyard, passing a wooden cart wheel and a red brick wall illuminated by another lantern. Finally, the movement concludes as the character approaches an arched wooden door at the end of the passage.
